title: Iqbal Verse #402 — Allama Iqbal Urdu Shayari
content:
قوم کیا چیز ہے، قوموں کی امامت کیا ہے
اس کو کیا سمجھیں یہ بیچارے دو رکعت کے امام!

— Translation —
What is a nation, or how to lead it?—
What clue these leaders of prayers could have of that!
meaning: "Iqbal Verse #402" by Allama Iqbal is a deep urdu poem consisting of 6 lines. This Urdu verse by Allama Iqbal showcases the rich tradition of South Asian poetry. The poet masterfully employs Urdu literary conventions to convey profound emotional depth. Beginning with "قوم کیا چیز ہے، قوموں کی امامت کیا ہے اس کو کیا سمجھیں یہ بیچارے دو رکعت کے امام!...", this piece explores themes of deep through vivid imagery and emotional resonance. The work invites contemplation on the deeper currents of life, love, and the human condition. Allama Iqbal's celebrated body of poetry continues to inspire readers across generations and cultures, and this particular work stands as a powerful example of their artistic vision.
